outlook.summary: The market is heavily dominated by positive gamma across all expirations, indicating a mean-reverting, low-volatility environment. Despite a bearish volatility skew and heavy put hedging, market makers are structurally long gamma, likely pinning the price between the 7000 and 7150 mega-cap strikes. Expect tight consolidation with automated delta-hedging creating strong magnetic levels.
